title: vitis thunbergii var. adstricta
intro: Vitis thunbergii var. adstricta is a variety of Japanese wild grapevine, scientifically known as a type of grapevine native to Japan, with its leaves and stems being used for medicinal purposes. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Vitis thunbergii var. adstricta include the potential reduction of blood pressure, improvement of cardiovascular health, and alleviation of symptoms associated with gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and may also be used in traditional Japanese medicine.
